{{Quote|Remember, I said they were unusually bright, for Gamorreans…but they weren't geniuses.|[[Cohden K'Reye]]|<ref name="WHSV" />}}
'''Gorge''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]]. Along with his brother, [[Greel]], he owned the [[The Broken Tusk (Reuss VIII)|Broken Tusk]] on [[Reuss VIII/Legends|Reuss VIII]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Portmoak sector/Legends|Portmoak sector]]. While his brother managed the business, Gorge was in charge of security.

==Biography==
Gorge and his brother Greel were slaves of [[Var'Rotha Fin'Rotha]] who were constrained at all times except when the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] needed them for physical labor.

While en route from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] after delivering a high-priced bounty, Fin'Rotha let Greel out of his cage to clean the ship's interior. Greel broke the ship's [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and while Fin'Rotha was busy making repairs Greel freed Gorge and the two took over the ship, forcing their former master into an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]].

The pair piloted their new ship, the ''[[Tolan's Tusk]]'' until its fuel cells ran out and the ship crash landed on Reuss VIII. The brothers then converted the crashed ship into a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]].

He used to fight regularly in the [[Dool Arena]] but he almost never fights anymore.

==Personality and traits==
Despite his appearance as a large, scarred, menacing Gamorrean Gorge was not a mindless beast. He picked fights carefully and tried to resolve fights before they started with a menacing growl.

His right front tusk was slightly broken, the tip having broken off in his crash-landing.

==Skills and abilities==
As expected of a Gamorrean, Gorge was incredibly fearsome in hand-to-hand combat. He could lay out opponents with his fists just as easily as he did with his [[vibromallet]]. He was surprisingly adept with [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]] as well.

==Equipment==
Gorge carried two [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] [[DL-44 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|DL-44 heavy blaster pistols]] as well as a two-handed vibromallet.

==Behind the scenes==
Gorge was designed by [[Paul Danner]] and [[Bill Smith]] for ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]].
